rollcalls.vote_title: Motion to Invoke Cloture: Motion to Proceed to S. 5
rollcalls.vote_document_text: A bill to require the Secretary of Homeland Security to take into custody aliens who have been charged in the United States with theft, and for other purposes.
rollcalls.question: On the Cloture Motion

rollcalls.vote_document_text: To expand the list of criminal offenses that subject inadmissible aliens to mandatory detention.

rollcalls.vote_question_text: On the Amendment S.Amdt. 14 to S.Amdt. 8 to S. 5 (No short title on file)

rollcalls.vote_title: Confirmation: Marco Rubio, of Florida, to be Secretary of State

rollcalls.question: On the Nomination

rollcalls.vote_document_text: A joint resolution providing for congressional disapproval under chapter 8 of title 5, United States Code, of the rule submitted by the Environmental Protection Agency relating to "Air Plan Approval; South Dakota; Regional Haze Plan for the Second Implementation Period".
